context.notes: Discovery call for an AI claims-triage assistant. Compliance and audit came up unprompted; the ops team mentioned they already keep a side spreadsheet.

signals.observation: Adjusters triage claims by hand against a 40-page policy PDF; a side Excel tracks edge cases the mainframe can't.
Compliance must be able to audit every automated decision; legal review gates anything touching member data.
Triage happens when a claim lands in the ServiceNow queue.
Unclear who signs off on adopting a new triage tool — the VP of Ops was in the room but deferred to 'governance'.
